title: AI Model Trainer — Individual Contractor @ DataAnnotation

highlights: AI model trainer at DataAnnotation.tech - Analyze and evaluate agentic AI models with autonomous or interactive multi-turn reasoning, tool-use decisions, and task execution flows. Skilled in ensuring consistency and identifying failure modes in agent behavior.
Work closely with project managers at Nowcom and their partners Westlake Financial and Western Funding Inc. to deliver quality solutions based on their needs.
Spearheaded the end-to-end migration of a Seafarers Assessment Desktop Application to a scalable web-based platform, enabling support for thousands of online test sessions per month.
